description: LotaData provides geocoded event, place, and location intelligence data and related people-intelligence products. Its public materials describe a geo-dashboard plus APIs/SDKs for working with location signals and event/place datasets.
summary: lotadata.com exposes one documented HTTP API, the LotaData API at https://api2.lotadata.com/v2, described by an OpenAPI/Swagger spec and authenticated with an API key passed as the `api_key` query parameter; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
